ip_risk_notes: Sudoku is a generic puzzle format. Avoid 'Will Shortz', 'Penny Press', 'KAPPA', 'New York Times' style branding.

unique_hook.angle: Variety puzzles (sudoku + crossword + word search) is a crowded category with strong incumbents (KAPPA, Penny Press); generic title would clone top-10

repeat_buyer.audience: Casual puzzle solvers who want variety

leading_indicators.google_trends: Sudoku evergreen (5y stable baseline, no major decline)
leading_indicators.etsy: Printable sudoku market exists but small relative to Amazon

tech_blocker: Our pipeline currently only outputs sudoku — no crossword/wordsearch generators
